resources.string: Can be configured later in settings
Start chatting with Hermes below. Your conversation runs the same agent as the terminal — just with a friendlier view.
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Leave blank to keep the existing key
Help us grow — your rating unlocks these features
Unlock powerful capabilities for your AI agent
Failed to install sqlite — check network and retry
The export file was not created
Device identity key is corrupted (length %1$d, expected 32)
No desktop paired yet (scan the QR on your computer first)
"QR integrity check failed — the device id doesn't match its key (the QR may be tampered with)"
This handoff QR has no conversation id — regenerate it on your computer
"This QR doesn't specify a conversation to receive (use the \"Send to phone\" QR on your desktop)"
"Can't reach your computer (%1$s) and it wasn't found on the local network. Make sure both devices are on the same Wi-Fi and the companion is running on your computer."
Imported %1$d conversation(s), %2$d new message(s), %3$d memory file(s).
Pulling and importing from your desktop…
Point at the handoff QR on your desktop
Merged %1$d conversation(s), %2$d new message(s), %3$d memory file(s) into your computer.
Set up an API key in Settings to get started
Your AI agent, ready when you are
Tap to set up in Settings →
Image attached — type your question, then send.
Add a one-tap toggle in the terminal to switch to a modern chat-style view. Same agent, friendlier interface.

Early access to features in development — help us test them. They may be unstable or change. Turning one on adds it to the list above; turning it off only hides the entry (your existing setup keeps working).
Run a small AI model entirely on this device — no API key, no internet needed after setup. Works best on devices with 4GB+ RAM.
Council of multiple models answering together — needs your configured providers.
Official Nous API login (device code) — Hermes 4 and 270+ models with a Nous subscription.
Barcode scanning library for Android, using ZXing for decoding.
"LiteRT-LM runs on-device — no API key needed. Make sure LiteRT-LM server is running before launching Hermes."
Experimental — faster long prompts on Adreno GPUs.
Fastest — Snapdragon NPU (Hexagon), ~22x faster prompt processing.
NPU model bundle not installed yet.
NPU support installed — restart the app to enable.
Paste a direct link to any .gguf file (e.g. from Hugging Face).
"That doesn't look like a valid URL."
Couldn’t delete the files — they may be in use. Restart the app and try again.
This removes the downloaded model file. You can download or import one again anytime.
On-device AI requires a Snapdragon device with an NPU. On other devices, pick a cloud provider from the AI Provider list.
The local model may have crashed last time. Clear it and re-download?
The engine is busy right now — try again in a moment.
"This file doesn't look like a valid GGUF model."
"Couldn't load the model. Please try again."
Daily download limit reached. Please try again tomorrow.
Not enough free storage on this device.
No model yet — pick a compute backend below to get started.
⚠️ This model has a short context window — best for brief Q&A. Long chats or agent tasks may exceed it; use CPU/GPU for those.
This removes the NPU model bundle. You can download it again anytime.
This device may run this model slowly. Continue anyway?
Model downloaded and ready to use.
Date does not match expected pattern: %1$s
Date out of expected year range %1$s - %2$s
Swipe to select a year, or tap to switch back to selecting a day
Scroll to show the next month
Scroll to show the previous month
Let your computer run tasks for you
"Decryption failed — the data may be tampered with, or this device isn't paired with that computer"
The computer rejected the connection — not paired yet? Re-link your computer
Send tasks from your phone to Hermes running on your computer, and get the results back here — your computer does the heavy lifting.
Works whenever Papers is running on your computer — connects by itself on the same Wi-Fi.
1. Open Papers on your computer — the phone connector starts with it. No terminal needed.
2. Stay on the same Wi-Fi — your phone connects by itself. (Backup: scan the QR or paste the pairing code from the connector.)
Set up at least one AI provider first — a council is built from your configured providers.
Several models answer in parallel, one model synthesizes — a council meeting before every reply.
This council is in use — after deleting, %1$s will be used instead.
This removes the council preset from config.yaml.
Cannot delete the only council. Create another one first.
Pick a provider and model for the synthesizer.
Reads all advisors and produces the final guidance.
💡 Each turn calls %1$d models (%2$d advisors + 1 synthesizer) — costs add up accordingly.
Two advisors use the same model — they will give similar advice.
Add at least one advisor with a provider and model.
A council named %1$s already exists — saving will overwrite it.
1–32 letters, digits, . _ - (no spaces, not a YAML word like true/null)
Each advisor answers independently; 2+ with different models works best.
The council in use (%1$s) no longer exists.
The terminal is waiting for you to respond to a prompt. Handle it first, then switch — your choice is already saved and will apply to the next chat.
Switched to %1$s. Apply it to the current conversation now?
Switch command typed into the terminal. If it’s waiting for your input at the prompt, press Enter there to apply it.
Allow app to send you notifications?
The pairing code expired before approval. Close and try again.
Sign in with your Nous account — official Nous API with Hermes 4 and 270+ models. Requires a Nous subscription for inference.
Inference requires a Nous subscription — without one, chat will show a subscribe link.
Your pairing code (verify it matches in the browser):
Waiting for approval in your browser…
"A browser tab opened. Sign in with ChatGPT — you'll be redirected back automatically."
"Experimental: opens OpenAI's sign-in page in your browser. Likely unsupported in your region due to OpenAI's policy."
Enter this code in your browser:
Could not parse the code automatically. Open the Terminal tab and look for the 6-character code shown after Enter this code:.
"Sign-in unavailable: due to OpenAI's policy, ChatGPT is not supported in your current region."
Uses your subscription — no API key, no per-usage charges.
Starting login… (this may take a few seconds)
Waiting for you to complete sign-in…
After you approve in the browser, return to this app — sign-in finishes automatically. xAI may show a page with a code; you can ignore it.
Sign-in unavailable: timed out waiting for redirect. xAI may not support sign-in from your region.
"Use your SuperGrok subscription — no API key needed. Opens xAI's sign-in page in your browser."
"Didn't finish on its own? If xAI showed a code, tap Copy on that page and paste it below."
"Thanks for your interest. We will share more once you're back online."
"You are back online! Let's pick up where we left off"
You are back online! Continue learning about %s
"We'll send you a notification with a link to the advertiser site."
This will wipe the entire Termux environment and reinstall everything. Your .env and API keys will be preserved. Continue?
Allow Ad to store image in Picture gallery?
Allow Ad to create a calendar event?
Keeps apers alive in the background
Check failed — tap to retry (network or GitHub unreachable)
🌐 Cannot reach GitHub. Please check your Wi-Fi or mobile data.
⚠️ GitHub returned an error. Please try again later.
🔒 Connection blocked. A VPN or firewall may be interfering.
📡 Connection timed out. Your network may be slow — please retry.
Verify bash / python / git / launcher / network
Check if a newer hermes-agent is available

"Move Hermes conversations between your computer and phone. Receive brings a desktop conversation here to continue; Sync merges this phone's conversations back. Requires the companion running on your computer."
Scan the handoff QR on your computer
Merge all conversations on this phone back to your paired computer
Re-run missing install steps (keeps your data)
Set up API keys from your computer
The sqlite component could not be installed. Please check your network, then use Settings → Repair Installation before launching Hermes.
This may take a few minutes…
Maximum %1$d concurrent sessions allowed. Please close an existing session first.
Paste an API key from a search provider so the agent can search the web. Tavily has a free tier and is a good start.
Add a Tavily/Exa key to enable web search
Sorry, the Android camera encountered a problem. You may need to restart the device.
Place a barcode inside the viewfinder rectangle to scan it.
